data.title: Snooze or Lose
data.statement:
Some mornings you wake up full of energy, others you can barely open your eyes. The secret often lies in sleep cycles.
Your body goes through {{90}}-minute cycles during the night. Waking up at the end of a cycle feels natural and refreshing, while waking up in the middle of one leaves you groggy and sluggish.
Given the total [[duration]] of your night's sleep, evaluate its quality based on two criteria: how long you slept and when in your cycle you woke up.

[[sleep quality]] is one of:
- Lack of sleep: strictly less than {{4}} complete cycles (under 6 hours)
- Perfect sleep: between {{4}} and {{6}} complete cycles (6h to 9h)
- Too much sleep: strictly more than {{6}} complete cycles (over 9 hours)


[[wake timing]] is one of:
- Perfect timing: woke up exactly at the end of a cycle
- Decent timing: woke up strictly less than {{30}} minutes into a new cycle
- Bad timing: woke up {{30}} minutes or more into a new cycle
data.inputDescription: <<Line 1:>> A string [[duration]] in the format HHhMM representing the sleep duration (07h30, 00h22, 21h01).

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Some mornings you wake up full of energy, others you can barely open your eyes. The secret often lies in sleep cycles.
Your body goes through 90-minute cycles during the night. Waking up at the end of a cycle feels natural and refreshing, while waking up in the middle of one leaves you groggy and sluggish.
Given the total duration of your night's sleep, evaluate its quality based on two criteria: how long you slept and when in your cycle you woke up.

sleep quality is one of:
- Lack of sleep: strictly less than 4 complete cycles (under 6 hours)
- Perfect sleep: between 4 and 6 complete cycles (6h to 9h)
- Too much sleep: strictly more than 6 complete cycles (over 9 hours)


wake timing is one of:
- Perfect timing: woke up exactly at the end of a cycle
- Decent timing: woke up strictly less than 30 minutes into a new cycle
- Bad timing: woke up 30 minutes or more into a new cycle
Input
Line 1: A string duration in the format HHhMM representing the sleep duration (07h30, 00h22, 21h01).
Output
Line1: sleep quality, wake timing
Constraints
Example
Input
06h00
Output
Perfect sleep, Perfect timing
